items.title: Sharing the Final Report of the Mayor’s Vision 2050 Task Force, Realize Vision
items.action: 2 speakers. The Mayor recognized the members of the Task Force and provided background on the report.

items.title: Discussion Regarding Potential Ballot Measures for the November 3, 2026,
items.action: M/S/C (Taplin/Blackaby) to accept revised materials from the City Manager on Item 2. Vote: Ayes – Kesarwani, Taplin, Tregub, O’Keefe, Blackaby, Humbert, Ishii; Noes – None; Abstain – None; Absent – Bartlett, Lunaparra. Action: 5 speakers. The Council discussed the report and presentation and provided direction to the City Manager regarding the community survey. Tuesday, December 2, 2025 ANNOTATED AGENDA Page 2 Adjournment Action: M/S/C (Taplin/Blackaby) to adjourn the meeting. Vote: All Ayes. Adjourned at 6:17 p.m. Communications Supplemental Communications and Reports 1 • None Supplemental Communications and Reports 2 • None Supplemental Communications and Reports 3 Item #2: Discussion Regarding Potential Ballot Measures for the November 3, 2026, General Municipal Election
